description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - MacOS/Linux/Windows via Pixi that runs weekly and on push and pull requests, excluding certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, macos-13, windows-latest) with different environments (all, all-py39) and build types (Release, Debug). For each job, it checks out the repository, sets up Pixi, and builds and tests Pinocchio with various configurations.
